---
title: "About"
image: catt.jpg
about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: twitter-x 
      text: x.com
      href: https://x.com/menschikowan
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/menshikow

---
mathematics undergrad

Interested in: 

**Pure Mathematics**, **Game Theory**, **Deep Learning Theory**, **Systems Programming**

<form action="https://buttondown.email/api/emails/embed-subscribe/menshikow" method="post" target="popupwindow" onsubmit="window.open('https://buttondown.email/menshikow', 'popupwindow')">
  <input type="email" name="email" id="bd-email" placeholder="Enter your email">
  <input type="submit" value="Subscribe">
</form>
